name: Asparagus Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 4 slices of bread in a greased 8-inch X 8-inch X 2-inch pan. Remove the crusts.
2. Arrange cheese slices on each piece of bread.
3. Evenly distribute asparagus pieces on top of the cheese.
4. Cover with another slice of bread.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, pepper, and mustard.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the bread layers.
7. Refrigerate overnight.
8. Sprinkle additional grated cheese on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes, or until set (the knife inserted comes out clean).
As a variation, use ham slices instead of asparagus and top with cornflakes and 4 tablespoons melted butter.
